title: Airplane Window Black And White Mountain House Photo
sourceTitle: Airplane Window Black And White Mountain House Photo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 4K black-and-white film photograph viewed through an airplane window, capturing futuristic ultra-modern house sitting on top of a snow-capped mountain in empty cloud layer, snowy summit, and vast isolated alpine sky. Subject: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Scene: empty cloud layer, snowy summit, and vast isolated alpine sky surrounds the house with only clouds and snow, creating a remote futuristic architecture moment suspended above the world. Composition: slightly elevated airplane-window view looking straight through the glass frames the scene straight through the airplane window, not from the side, with the rounded window edge acting as the natural foreground frame. Signature Elements: Preserved airplane window black and white mountain house photo source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Stunning black-and-white architectural landscape photography with film camera aesthetic, realistic airplane-window perspective, crisp mountain detail, and quiet cinematic isolation. Color Palette: Pure monochrome palette with deep blacks, snowy whites, silver cloud grays, soft film grain, and strong tonal contrast. Lighting: High-altitude natural daylight filtered through clouds, bright snow reflection, subtle atmospheric haze, and balanced black-and-white exposure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Airplane Window Black And White Mountain House Photo Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 4K black-and-white film photograph viewed through an airplane window, capturing View through an airplane window capturing a stunning 4K black-and-white photo of a futuristic, ultra-modern house sitting on top of a snow-capped mountain. in nothing around the structure except clouds, snow, and distant white ridges. Subject: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Scene: nothing around the structure except clouds, snow, and distant white ridges surrounds the house with only clouds and snow, creating a remote futuristic architecture moment suspended above the world. Composition: direct forward-facing airplane-window shot from just above the mountain line frames the scene straight through the airplane window, not from the side, with the rounded window edge acting as the natural foreground frame. Signature Elements: Preserved airplane window black and white mountain house photo source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Stunning black-and-white architectural landscape photography with film camera aesthetic, realistic airplane-window perspective, crisp mountain detail, and quiet cinematic isolation. Color Palette: Pure monochrome palette with deep blacks, snowy whites, silver cloud grays, soft film grain, and strong tonal contrast. Lighting: High-altitude natural daylight filtered through clouds, bright snow reflection, subtle atmospheric haze, and balanced black-and-white exposure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
